name: SQL Stored Procedure Creation for Persistence
description: Detects creation of suspicious stored procedures that may be used for persistence
query:
// Detect creation of stored procedures with command execution
// Trigger on xp_cmdshell or CLR assembly creation
events from database
where event_type matches "(?i)(create_procedure|alter_procedure|sp_configure)"
  and cmdline matches "(?i)(xp_cmdshell|sp_OACreate|CLR|UNSAFE_ASSEMBLY|EXTERNAL_ACCESS)"
group by source_ip
having count(*) > 0
within 300 seconds
